title: Super Sentai Craft
description: A mod that adds Super Sentai, with hundreds of items, weapons and forms
body:
This is the official modrinth upload of Super Sentai Craft.

Since 1975, The Super Sentai Series has captivated people across the world with it's stories, characters, and it's 'tokusatsu' production techniques. Now, nearly 50 years of Japanese cultural icons arrives in Minecraft!

Super Sentai Craft began as a small project in March 2019, and has since evolved into a spawling mod with hundreds of items, weapons, and forms with multiple developers on board. Back at the start of 2023 I decided to start to recode this mod from scratch. With the goal to make the mod a lot more friendly to work on.

You will Need GeckoLib to play the newer 1.21.1 versions of this mod.

'Super Sentai' and related characters are owned by Toei Company, Ltd. I do not make any claim to have created or own the concepts and designs shown in this mod. No profit has been made or will be made from this mod.
